name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

---

## Motivation / Use Case

Why is this feature needed? Describe the problem it solves or the value it brings.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work. Include any relevant design ideas, configuration changes, or CLI command examples.

---

## APML / Configuration Impact

If this feature involves changes to the APML spec, quota model, or routing logic, describe the expected impact here.

```yaml
# Example APML snippet (if applicable)
```

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered and why you prefer the proposed solution.

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots here.
